name: jsonresume-theme-minimal-clean
description: Tema minimalista y limpio para JSON Resume

scripts.html:cli:professional:es:bundled: node scripts/build-professional-theme.mjs && npx --package resume-cli resume export resume_es_professional.html -r resume_es.json -t ./build/jsonresume-theme-professional/index.cjs
scripts.html:cli:professional:en:bundled: node scripts/build-professional-theme.mjs && npx --package resume-cli resume export resume_en_professional.html -r resume_en.json -t ./build/jsonresume-theme-professional/index.cjs
scripts.html:cli:stackoverflow:es: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('stack_overflow', { recursive: true })" && npx --package resume-cli resume export stack_overflow/resume_es_stackoverflow.html -r resume_es.json -t jsonresume-theme-stackoverflow
scripts.html:cli:stackoverflow:en: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('stack_overflow', { recursive: true })" && npx --package resume-cli resume export stack_overflow/resume_en_stackoverflow.html -r resume_en.json -t jsonresume-theme-stackoverflow
scripts.pdf:cli:stackoverflow:es: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('stack_overflow', { recursive: true })" && npx --package resume-cli resume export stack_overflow/Oscar_David_Valencia_resume_es_stackoverflow.pdf -r resume_es.json -t jsonresume-theme-stackoverflow
scripts.pdf:cli:stackoverflow:en: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('stack_overflow', { recursive: true })" && npx --package resume-cli resume export stack_overflow/Oscar_David_Valencia_resume_en_stackoverflow.pdf -r resume_en.json -t jsonresume-theme-stackoverflow

author: Oscar David Valencia Alvarez
